pages.text: Agriculture has 8 core tiers. Item IDs and book names match exactly: kubejs:agriculture_core_t1, kubejs:agriculture_core_t2, etc.

$(li)$(item)kubejs:agriculture_core_t1$() gates: mysticalagriculture:infusion_altar, mysticalagriculture:infusion_pedestal, mysticalagriculture:inferium_farmland, botanypots:terracotta_botany_pot
$(li)$(item)kubejs:agriculture_core_t2$() gates: mysticalagriculture:prudentium_essence, productivebees:centrifuge, mysticalagriculture:prudentium_farmland
$(li)$(item)kubejs:agriculture_core_t3$() gates: mysticalagriculture:tertium_essence, botanypots:hopper_botany_pot, productivebees:advanced_oak_beehive
$(li)$(item)kubejs:agriculture_core_t4$() gates: mysticalagriculture:imperium_essence, productivebees:powered_centrifuge
$(li)$(item)kubejs:agriculture_core_t5$() gates: mysticalagriculture:supremium_essence
$(li)$(item)kubejs:agriculture_core_t6$() gates: mysticalagriculture:master_infusion_crystal
